display_text: Dazzle Aghanim's Scepter: Shadow Wave can now target and bounce between enemies, dealing damage and healing allies. This upgrade counters AoE control by enabling Dazzle to damage enemies while simultaneously healing allies, turning him into a versatile damage and support hybrid in teamfights.
search_text: Dazzle Aghanim Scepter Shadow Wave counter-AoE control damage heal teamfight hybrid

display_text: Dazzle Aghanim's Shard: Nothl Projection can be cast while disabled, increasing healing in the Nothl Realm. This upgrade counters disables, allowing Dazzle to maintain crucial healing and utility even when targeted by silence or stuns, reinforcing his role as a reliable team sustain hero.
search_text: Dazzle Aghanim Shard Nothl Projection counter-disable silence stun reliable sustain healing
